situation: Filled out the Wohnungsgeberbestätigung using a form downloaded from an unofficial website. The form was an outdated version from 2019 and was missing required fields added in the 2021 BMG update.
rejection_reason: Form version was outdated and did not contain all legally required fields per the 2021 update to the BMG. Staff rejected it immediately without further processing.
what_worked: Downloaded the current official form from Hamburg.de, had landlord re-sign it, and returned the same day. Staff processed it immediately with the correct form.
what_failed: Arguing that the content was the same despite the version difference. Offering to handwrite the missing fields on the old form. Asking to speak to a supervisor.
